description_long: This is a rustic log cabin constructed primarily from horizontally stacked wooden logs, featuring a weathered, gabled roof with a central chimney. The exterior walls display the natural texture and color of aged wood, with visible log ends at the corners. The cabin has several windows with white-painted frames and decorative trim, arranged symmetrically on the longer facades and a single window on one of the shorter sides. A single, solid wooden door is present on one of the long sides, accompanied by a small step. The roof is steeply pitched and covered in wooden shingles, showing signs of age and exposure. The overall appearance suggests a traditional, hand-built structure typical of rural or forested environments.
description: A rustic log cabin with a steep gabled roof, central chimney, and symmetrically arranged windows with white trim. The weathered wood exterior and single front door evoke a traditional, hand-built style.
description_view_0: This view shows the long side of the cabin with three symmetrically spaced windows and the full expanse of the weathered gabled roof.
description_view_1: This end view reveals the triangular gable, central chimney, and three closely grouped windows beneath the roof peak.
description_view_2: This side displays the main entrance door, two windows, and the same weathered roof, with the door offset to the right.
description_view_3: This end view shows a single window centered beneath the gable, with visible log ends and no door.
attribute_roof_type: gable roof with a steep pitch, central chimney, and wooden shingle covering
attribute_window_arrangement: Multiple small rectangular windows with white trim; three symmetrically spaced on each long side, three grouped on one gable end, and a single centered window on the opposite gable end
attribute_door_placement: One exterior door located on the long side, offset to the right, adjacent to two windows
